findings.title: Overly permissive CORS configuration with wildcard origins and credentials
findings.description: Spring CORS configured with allowedOriginPatterns(*), allowedMethods(*), allowedHeaders(*), and allowCredentials(true)

findings.title: XML External Entity processing enabled in product import
findings.description: DocumentBuilderFactory created with setExpandEntityReferences(true) and no XXE protection features

findings.title: Verbose error handling exposes stack traces to clients
findings.description: Global exception handler returns exception class name, message, and full stack trace in JSON response

findings.title: Unrestricted settings modification without authentication
findings.description: PUT /api/settings allows any unauthenticated user to modify security-critical application settings via putAll

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes database credentials and system properties
findings.description: Admin diagnostics returns JDBC URL with password, system properties, and classpath
